_comment: Cinema Worldbuilder example: TEXT-TO-VIDEO on LTX 2.3 22B distilled Q2_K GGUF. Rebuilt from the official ComfyUI 'Text to Video (LTX 2 Distilled)' template (comfyui_workflow_templates_media_video/video_ltx2_t2v_distilled.json) as the structural source of truth. SAMPLING FIX: the distilled model requires explicit ManualSigmas (NOT LTXVScheduler) -> CFGGuider(cfg=1) + KSamplerSelect(euler_ancestral) + RandomNoise -> SamplerCustomAdvanced. Base-pass sigmas reproduced verbatim from the template node 176: '1., 0.99375, 0.9875, 0.98125, 0.975, 0.909375, 0.725, 0.421875, 0.0'. SECOND-PASS REFINE OMITTED: the official template's pass 2 uses LTXVLatentUpsampler + LatentUpscaleModelLoader, but no spatial-upscaler model is installed on this machine (LatentUpscaleModelLoader combo is empty, models/latent_upscale_models/ is empty). Base pass alone carries the architecture fix. MODEL STACK SWAP: official template loads via CheckpointLoaderSimple + fp8 safetensors (not installed here); swapped to the verified GGUF stack from C:/_POC/ltx-geo-bias/workflow/ltx23_warp_v2v.json -> UnetLoaderGGUF + LTXVChunkFeedForward (chunks=2, dim_threshold=4096, for 12GB VRAM) + DualCLIPLoaderGGUF + VAELoaderKJ x2. The official template's distilled LoraLoaderModelOnly is dropped (the GGUF is already the distilled model). RESOLUTION: template base is 960x544x121; capped to 768x512 to fit 12GB VRAM (length is driven by the Cinema CameraBlock frame_count). Requires: ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-1.1-Q2_K.gguf, gemma-3-12b-it-IQ4_XS.gguf, ltx23_embeddings_connector.safetensors, ltx23_video_vae.safetensors, ltx23_audio_vae.safetensors.

inputs.stage_lighting: soft key with practical lamp glow

inputs.sounds: distant city hum, footsteps on wet pavement, a soft breeze

inputs.style_and_mood: cinematic, moody, photoreal, shallow depth of field
inputs.dynamic_description: a lone figure walks slowly toward camera through a rain-slicked alley
inputs.static_description: narrow alley, neon signage reflecting on puddles, brick walls

inputs.text: blurry, distorted, jittery, warped, low quality
